linkedin_post:
Are you overpaying for automation in 2026?

We just completed an in-depth comparison of Zapier vs Make, and the results might surprise you.

The key finding: Make delivers 10x more operations per dollar than Zapier in 2026.

For businesses running complex, multi-step workflows, this cost difference compounds quickly. What you'd pay $500/month for on Zapier could cost you just $50/month on Make.

Zapier still has advantages—its user interface is more beginner-friendly, and it offers more pre-built integrations. But if cost-efficiency and workflow complexity are priorities for your business, Make is the clear winner.

We analyzed pricing tiers, feature sets, learning curves, and real-world use cases to help you make an informed decision.

Read the full breakdown here:
https://saaspulsemedia.com/articles/zapier-vs-make-in-2026-which-automation-platform-is-worth-yo-w7q6.html
